title: Extract Product Codes
scenario: Extract product codes from the following product data: Product 1: ABC-123, Product 2: DEF-456, Product 3: GHI-789. The output should be a comma-separated list of extracted product codes.
constraints: Must be in the format of a letter followed by a hyphen and then 3 digits

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the format and character constraints.
Verify if each extracted product code starts with a letter followed by a hyphen and then 3 digits.
